issues.description: Condition should be 'HasLife' comparing opponent life cards, not 'HasRestingDon'. The card text states 'If you have less Life cards than your opponent' which requires a life comparison condition, not a DON condition.
Trigger should be 'Activated' or similar state-check, but the condition logic is wrong. This is a passive/state-based effect that should trigger when the condition becomes true.
Second effect (TrashFromHand → PlaySelf) has no basis in the card text. The card only describes a power boost conditional on life total difference. This effect should be removed entirely.
